evals.name: DCM from Euler Angles
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses angle2dcm instead of building rotation matrices from scratch
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to build a DCM to transform from NED to body frame given roll=10 degrees, pitch=5 degrees, yaw=30 degrees. Display the resulting 3x3 matrix.

assertions.description: Does not manually construct rotation matrices with cos(
Converts degrees to radians before calling angle2dcm
assertions.expected: Uses deg2rad() or convang() to convert degrees to radians before passing to angle2dcm

evals.name: ECI to ECEF Conversion
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses eci2ecef for time-dependent frame transform
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to convert ECI position [-2981784, 5207055, 3161595] meters and ECI velocity [-3384, -4887, 4843] m/s to ECEF at 12:00 UTC on January 4, 2019. Display both ECEF position and velocity.

assertions.description: ECEF position X component is approximately -5762655
assertions.expected: ECEF position X component is negative and near -5762655 (within 1000m tolerance)

assertions.description: Does not manually build rotation matrix from sidereal time

evals.name: Euler to Rodrigues Vector
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses angle2rod directly instead of multi-step conversion
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to determine the Euler-Rodrigues vector from rotation angles of yaw=0.7854 radians, pitch=0.1 radians, and roll=0 radians. Display the result.

assertions.description: Uses angle2rod function for direct conversion

assertions.expected: Rotation sequence is specified (e.g., 'ZYX') in the function call

assertions.description: Does not use indirect multi-step conversion via DCM

evals.name: Aerospace Unit Conversions
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses convXXX functions for unit conversion
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to: (1) convert 250 knots to m/s, (2) convert 35000 feet to kilometers, (3) convert 1 slug to kilograms, (4) convert 212 degrees F to Celsius, (5) convert 2 G's of acceleration to meters per second squared, (6) convert 7 nautical miles to miles. Display all results.

assertions.description: Uses correct unit string 'naut mi' with space for nautical miles
assertions.expected: The convlength call for nautical miles uses the unit string 'naut mi' (with a space) as documented in Aerospace Toolbox

assertions.description: Uses correct unit string for G's with escaped apostrophe
assertions.expected: The convacc call uses the unit string 'G''s' (with escaped apostrophe) as documented in Aerospace Toolbox

assertions.description: Does not use manual conversion factor for knots

evals.name: Time Conversions
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses tdbjuliandate and leapyear instead of manual computation
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to: (1) compute the TDB Julian Date for Terrestrial Time 2014/10/15 16:22:31, (2) determine whether years 2000, 2005, and 2020 are leap years. Display all results.

assertions.description: Does not compute leap year with manual modulo logic

evals.name: Quaternion Rotation and Interpolation
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses the quaternion object with correct conventions for rotation and SLERP
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to: (1) Create a quaternion representing a 45-degree yaw rotation (ZYX sequence, frame rotation). (2) Rotate the vector [1 0 0] by this quaternion. (3) Create a second quaternion for 90-degree yaw, then smoothly interpolate 5 equally spaced orientations between them. Display the rotated point and the Euler angles (degrees) of all interpolated quaternions.

assertions.description: Uses rotateframe or quatrotate for vector rotation
assertions.expected: Code uses rotateframe() or quatrotate() to rotate the vector. FAIL if rotation is done manually with matrix multiplication or custom formula.

assertions.description: Does not manually implement SLERP formula

evals.name: Geodetic to Geocentric Latitude
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses geod2geoc for geodetic-to-geocentric latitude conversion
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to convert geodetic latitude 45 degrees at 1000m altitude to geocentric latitude. Display the result in degrees.

assertions.description: Converts degrees to radians before calling geod2geoc
assertions.expected: Uses deg2rad() or convang() to convert 45 degrees to radians before passing to geod2geoc, since geod2geoc expects radians

assertions.description: Does not manually compute geocentric latitude with atan/tan formula

evals.name: Body-to-Wind DCM
evals.description: Tests whether agent uses dcmbody2wind for body-to-wind frame rotation matrix
evals.prompt: Write MATLAB code to compute the body-to-wind rotation matrix for a frame based rotation given 8 degrees angle of attack and 3 degrees sideslip. Display the resulting 3x3 matrix.

assertions.description: Converts degrees to radians before calling dcmbody2wind
assertions.expected: Uses deg2rad() or convang() to convert 8 and 3 degrees to radians before passing to dcmbody2wind, since dcmbody2wind expects radians

assertions.description: Does not manually construct rotation matrix with cos/sin
